plugins.name: rf-research
plugins.description: Research methodology coaching for the RainFocus UX team. Helps plan studies, recommend methods, pressure-test plans, and synthesize findings grounded in how research works at RainFocus. Also includes connections to Amplitude and Confluence data.

plugins.name: rf-writing-guide
plugins.description: Write and review content adhering to the RainFocus Written Style Guide. Helps with voice, tone, grammar, capitalization, and brand consistency.
